case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. MARIA BURGOS et al

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BURGOS, MARIA
